title: elymus serotinus
intro: Elymus serotinus, also known as the late bent or late June grass, is a species of flowering plant in the grass family. It is primarily used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asian cultures, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Elymus serotinus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Elymus serotinus is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
